description_long: This object is a stylized stuffed toy resembling a rabbit or similar animal, with exaggerated, angular features and a metallic, reflective surface. The toy has large, pointed ears, a rounded head, and a compact body with four legs. Its surface is predominantly a shiny, light pink color, with some areas appearing more silvery or lavender, especially on the face and ears. The toy's eyes are large and faceted, giving it a crystalline appearance, and its limbs are simplified and geometric. The overall design is abstract and modern, with sharp edges and a faceted look, making it stand out as a decorative or collectible item.
description: A shiny, faceted stuffed toy resembling a rabbit with large pointed ears and a metallic pink surface. Its design is abstract and geometric, with crystalline eyes and simplified limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large pointed ears, crystalline eyes, and rounded face, with the body and limbs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular profile of the head and ears, as well as the simplified, geometric limbs and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, ears, and body, with the tail and hind legs most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other profile, emphasizing the faceted surface and the toy's abstract form.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with large, faceted eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and expressionless appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four legs with the head facing forward and ears pointed upward.
